title: Diffusion Models explained..
summary: Caleb Writes Code and Julia Turc explain how diffusion models work as a process and framework rather than a specific architecture. The video covers the progression, strengths, weaknesses, and implementation details including how diffusion can be combined with transformers as in DiT.
